description: Checked-in release milestone exit evidence for the actual GitHub milestones v0.4 through v0.9. Each entry carries the canonical milestone-description evidence block that validates against the release-exit-evidence contract (scripts/release_exit_evidence.py). The v0.6.1 binary release is a patch under the v0.6 milestone.

milestones.summary: Deterministic golden corpus recorded; live performance evidence remains pending

Real Rust repository observations emitted; resource counters and promotion evidence remain pending
Visual corpus and provider-unavailable report recorded; visual and OCR evidence remains pending
Research issues #90–#95 remain open; benchmark-gated research is planned, not implementation-complete
